name: Pregnancy concern
purpose: Organize pregnancy-related symptoms and questions for antenatal or emergency care — not obstetric diagnosis.
not_allowed: Diagnosing miscarriage, ectopic pregnancy, or preeclampsia
Replacing antenatal or emergency obstetric care

red_flags.label: bleeding or severe pain in pregnancy

required_questions.prompt: How far along is the pregnancy (weeks or months, if known)?
What symptom or worry brought you here?
Any bleeding, fluid leak, or severe pain?

allowed_actions.title: Prepare for antenatal visit
allowed_actions.instruction: List symptoms, timing, and questions for your antenatal clinic.

allowed_actions.title: Seek urgent obstetric care
allowed_actions.instruction: Heavy bleeding, severe pain, or severe headache in pregnancy needs urgent care.
